Appearances on Thursday, March 20, 2014:

Doris Chau, Esq. appears by Limited Scope Representation for Defendant SANDRA TOM, who is also present

The Judge Pro Tem, the litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case does not settle. The trial date of MAR-24-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
